title: papaver lateritium
intro: Papaver lateritium, also known as the laterite poppy, is a species of flowering plant in the poppy family (Papaveraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Papaver lateritium include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Papaver lateritium can be found in the form of tinctures, teas, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and effects.
